commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh This is an evil among all things that are done under the sun, that there is one event unto all: yea, also the heart of the sons of men is full of evil, and madness is in their heart while they live, and after that they go to the dead. People hence take occasion to indulge in vice, (chap. ) though the conduct of God be irreproachable. (Calmet) Shall. Hebrew, "they go to the dead. "(Haydock) Many think that these are the sentiments of the impious.
